did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is an editorial for a special issue on cutaneous oncology. While it mentions a study by K. Møllersen et al. that compares computer-assisted decision support systems (specifically Nevus Doctor) for melanoma detection, this editorial itself does not use AI to obtain its results; it summarizes other clinical studies, retrospective analyses, and reviews.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
